provenance.authority: IGN Geoplateforme WFS AOC-VITICOLES:aire_parcellaire (INAO delimited AOC parcels), Licence Ouverte Etalab
provenance.membership_source: data/wine-map/inao-denomination-membership.json (exact member names + parcel counts, pinned in-repo)
provenance.method: GENERALIZED_FROM_OFFICIAL_SOURCE - server-side denom LIKE bound, client-side exact membership match, client-side concave dissolve (same engine as the live pipeline).
caveats: Provence is an AGGREGATE region (no single 'Provence' AOC): the region place france.provence outline is the multi-member dissolve of its constituent AOCs, built at flip time - deferred here (heavy fetch). This artifact previews the constituent appellations.

Cotes de Provence is a large sprawling AOC across the Var - expect several components (correct). 'Cotes de Provence Sainte-Victoire' is a named terroir WITHIN Cotes de Provence; other CdP terroirs (Frejus, La Londe, Pierrefeu, Notre-Dame des Anges) exist and are deferred/verify.
Other Provence AOCs not yet included (verify/deferred): Cassis, Bellet, Coteaux de Pierrevert.
Palette (58 parcels) and Les Baux de Provence (279) are small; Bandol (882) is the prestige Mourvedre cru near Toulon.

modeling_decision: france.provence = aggregate region (tier 1, boundary = multi-member dissolve of the constituent AOCs, built at flip time). Constituents: the three large regional AOCs (Cotes de Provence, Coteaux d'Aix-en-Provence, Coteaux varois en Provence) modeled appellation_level=district; the smaller/prestige AOCs (Bandol, Les Baux de Provence, Palette) and the CdP terroir (Sainte-Victoire) modeled appellation_level=village. All is_appellation=true, appellation_system=AOC, classification=GENERALIZED_FROM_OFFICIAL_SOURCE, primary_parent=france.provence. Grapes: rose-dominant (Grenache, Cinsault, Syrah, Mourvedre, Tibouren; Rolle/Vermentino for whites); Bandol is Mourvedre-led. Scoring links: exact-name against live reference rows (never fuzzy); appellations without an exact scoring row stay PENDING. NOT run live - reviewable groundwork; the catalog/boundary/flip/links/content build waits on the owner shape-review gate.
